title: turnera aurantiaca
intro: Turnera aurantiaca, also known as Mexican damiana, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and enhancing libido. Turnera aurantiaca is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
